data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Slightly Below Expectations
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending March 22 reached 224,000. This figure was slightly below the anticipated 225,000. The previous week's data was revised from 223,000 to 225,000.

data.title: U.S. Fourth Quarter Core PCE Price Index and GDP Final Values Released
data.description: According to Odaily, the United States' fourth-quarter core Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index annual rate remained steady at 2.8%, consistent with previous figures. Additionally, the final value of the U.S. fourth-quarter annualized real Gross Domestic Product (GDP) was reported at $23.5423 trillion, slightly up from the prior estimate of $23.5363 trillion.

data.title: The Smarter Web Company Plans UK Listing with Bitcoin Strategy
data.description: According to Foresight News, The Smarter Web Company, a UK-based web development firm, is planning to go public in the UK with a Bitcoin-focused strategy. The company aims to list on the open market as early as April 2, under the stock ticker SWC. The firm's balance sheet currently includes Bitcoin, and it has authorization to acquire more. Tyler Evans, co-founder of UTXO Management, is listed as a director of The Smarter Web Company.

data.title: Ripple and Chipper Cash reach cooperation to expand XRP payment in Africa
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ripple announced a partnership with Chipper Cash to expand XRP payments in the African market. The latter currently has five million customers in nine African countries. This partnership will use Ripple Payments and XRP to promote faster and more efficient cross-border transactions. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Gate.io will launch Fluid(FLUID) spot trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Fluid (FLUID) spot trading at 22:00 (UTC+8) on March 27, 2025.

data.title: Market Analysts Predict Potential Retest of Lower Levels Amid Narrow Fluctuations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Greeks.live analyst Adam shared insights on social media regarding the current market sentiment. He noted that while some groups are cautiously bearish, most traders anticipate a retest of lower levels around $84,000 to $85,000. Meanwhile, others have observed that the market is fluctuating within a narrow range. A significant resistance level has been identified at $884,000, where substantial passive selling has been observed. Additionally, a potential support level is noted at $77,000, which some traders consider a definitive bottom.

data.title: Michael Saylor released a GPT-4o generated image with the caption: Don’t sell your Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor, founder of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), released a picture generated by ChatGPT's GPT-4o on the X platform with the caption: Don't sell your Bitcoin.

data.title: Data: Only 19% of banks and financial institutions in Europe provide crypto services
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - A recent survey by crypto investment platform Bitpanda shows that European banks and financial institutions may have seriously underestimated the demand for cryptocurrency services, with less than 20% of banks and financial institutions offering digital asset products. A survey of 10,000 retail and commercial investors in 13 European countries found that more than 40% of commercial investors already hold cryptocurrencies, and another 18% plan to invest in the near future. However, only 19% of the financial institutions surveyed said that their customers showed strong demand for crypto products. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Mysten Labs: Sui Wallet’s Walrus airdrop issue has been resolved
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sui developer Mysten Labs posted on the X platform that the problem that users had encountered when using Sui Wallet to claim Walrus airdrops has now been resolved and users can now claim the airdrops smoothly.

data.title: KILO TGE event has ended, with oversubscription of about 365 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The exclusive TGE event of KiloEx (KILO) launched on Binance Wallet has ended, raising a total of 442,985 BNBs, with a fundraising target of 1,213.94 BNBs, which was oversubscribed by about 365 times.
